answers: Elder care options: home care, assisted living, nursing homes, and adult day care. Choose based on needs and budget.
Tips: respect their dignity, involve them in decisions, manage medications, ensure safety at home, and spend quality time.
Home safety: remove trip hazards, install grab bars, ensure good lighting, and consider a medical alert system.
Briddhoder jotno: shomman dao, nirapotta nischit koro, doctor er sathe niyomito jaogo, ar shomoy dao.
